title: A novel bile leak test using contrast-enhanced intraoperative ultrasonic cholangiography in liver resection: a prospective single-arm trial.
abstract: Bile leak (BL) remains a major complication after liver resection and is associated with substantial postoperative morbidity. Conventional dye-based tests can identify visible leakage from the transection surface, but whether the injected reagent has adequately reached peripheral intrahepatic ducts adjacent to the cut surface is often uncertain. We evaluated the feasibility and safety of a novel BL test using contrast-enhanced intraoperative ultrasonic cholangiography (CE-IOUSC) for real-time confirmation of intrabiliary reagent filling.
